SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF JACKIE WRIGHT IS PRESNT. DEFENDANTS CARL BARNES, GALE ROSBORO AND JOYCE WATSON ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST COMMUNITY CORPORATION IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY KRISTIN ROSBORO, EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR. DEFENDANT JOYCE WAATSON WAIVES SERVICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO DEFENANT SHARON PAGE PRESLEY. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS A DISMISSAL AS TO SHARON PAGE PRESLEY. EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, JACKIE AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST COMMUNITY CORPORATION
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, JACKIE AS TO DEFENDANT WATSON, JOYCE

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, JACKIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BARNES, CARL SOUTHWEST COMMUNITY CORPORATION ROSBORO, GALE WATSON, JOYCE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST SHARON PAGE PRESLEY IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
